intent: TIER: A-strict; REQUIRES: Qdrant + OpenAI-compatible embeddings via OPENAI_API_KEY and EMBEDDING_MODEL_NAME, Alephant-Cache, valid VK + model; curlPrelude warms, main curl paraphrased; HTTP HIT alone cannot distinguish semantic from exact KV
curlPrelude: curl -f -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer legend" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Alephant-Cache-Enabled: true" -H "Alephant-Embeddings-Key: $OPENAI_API_KEY" -H "Alephant-Embeddings-Model: $EMBEDDING_MODEL_NAME" -d '{"model":"openai/gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"sc-2-warm $HARNESS_E2E_RUN_TOKEN: one word answer yes"}],"max_tokens":32}'
curl: curl -f -X POST "$GATEWAY_BASE/v1/chat/completions" -H "Authorization: Bearer legend" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Alephant-Cache-Enabled: true" -H "Alephant-Embeddings-Key: $OPENAI_API_KEY" -H "Alephant-Embeddings-Model: $EMBEDDING_MODEL_NAME" -d '{"model":"openai/gpt-4o-mini","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"sc-2 paraphrase $HARNESS_E2E_RUN_TOKEN: reply in one word yes"}],"max_tokens":32}'
